ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, fully legible. ICC-issued certificate with security code and QR verification.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, fully legible. 5-page commercial invoice with detailed line items and totals.

document_pairing.method: Consignor match and order reference match
document_pairing.certificate_reference_to_invoice: Order No. 10207 referenced in certificate remarks field as '10207/CNS/Made in India', matching invoice ORDER NO: 10207
document_pairing.pairing_notes: Certificate consignor 'Central National Sweden AB' matches invoice issuer. Certificate remarks '10207/CNS/Made in India' matches invoice ORDER NO: 10207 and SHIPPING MARKS. No explicit invoice number in certificate but strong consignor and order reference match.

criteria_met: Consignor 'Central National Sweden AB' identified as invoice issuer in header on all pages
Consignee 'Omani Packaging' identified in invoice SOLD TO and CONSIGNED TO fields
Order reference 10207 matches between certificate remarks and invoice ORDER NO

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The remarks field contains '10207/CNS/Made in India' which is an order/shipping mark reference, not an LC reference.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 header: 'Central National Sweden AB'
Invoice page 2 header: 'Central National Sweden AB'
Invoice page 3 header: 'Central National Sweden AB'
Invoice page 4 header: 'Central National Sweden AB'
Invoice page 4 footer: 'CENTRAL NATIONAL SWEDEN AB'
Invoice page 5 header: 'Central National Sweden AB'

candidates.raw_text: P.O. Box 99, 124 Rusayl of Oman, Oman
candidates.normalized_text: p.o. box 99, 124 rusayl of oman, oman

candidates.raw_text: P.O. Box 99, 124, Rusayl of Oman, Oman, 2482
candidates.normalized_text: p.o. box 99, 124, rusayl of oman, oman, 2482

candidates.raw_text: P.O. Box 99, 124, Rusayl of Oman, Oman, 2482
candidates.normalized_text: p.o. box 99, 124, rusayl of oman, oman, 2482

candidates.raw_text: Fluting ref. Smurfit Westrock - Morai (multiple lines, various specifications)
Testliner ref. Smurfit Westrock - Morai (multiple lines, various specifications)

consignor.certificate_value: Central National Sweden AB, Södra Larmgatan 6, 411 16, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Central National Sweden AB, Södra Larmgatan 6, Gothenburg, 41 116, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name 'Central National Sweden AB' in all invoice pages.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND - Name 'Central National Sweden AB' found in invoice header on all 5 pages.

comparison_steps.description: Verify company name match between certificate and invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 'Central National Sweden AB' in certificate exactly matches 'Central National Sweden AB' in invoice header.

comparison_steps.description: Verify country Sweden. Invoice header states 'Gothenburg, 41 116, Sweden'. Also VAT NO prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Country Sweden confirmed via explicit address and SE VAT prefix.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: Sweden. Invoice: Sweden (explicit in address).
comparison_steps.result: MATCH

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name found in invoice header
Country verified via explicit address and VAT prefix

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor 'Central National Sweden AB' at 'Södra Larmgatan 6, 411 16, GÖTEBORG, Sweden' exactly matches invoice issuer 'Central National Sweden AB' at 'Södra Larmgatan 6, Gothenburg, 41 116, Sweden'. The company name is identical. The city name difference 'GÖTEBORG' vs 'Gothenburg' is a Swedish vs English spelling of the same city, and per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not in themselves cause MISMATCH — the key factors are company name and country, both of which match exactly. Country Sweden is confirmed by the explicit address in the invoice and by the SE-prefix in the VAT number.
consignor.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Central National Sweden AB' i certifikatet matchar exakt fakturautställaren. Land Sverige bekräftas via fakturans adress och VAT-prefix SE. MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: Omani Packaging, P.O. Box 99, 124 Rusayl of Oman, Oman
consignee.invoice_value: Omani Packaging Company SAOG, P.O. Box 99, 124, Rusayl of Oman, Oman, 2482

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has both SOLD TO and CONSIGNED TO fields, both containing 'Omani Packaging Company SAOG'. SOLD TO is primary factoring field.
comparison_steps.result: Primary party identified: 'Omani Packaging Company SAOG' in SOLD TO field.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Omani Packaging'. Invoice: 'Omani Packaging Company SAOG'. Certificate name is shorter — missing 'Company SAOG'.
comparison_steps.result: Proceed to sequential normalization testing.

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.3.5 (applied to consignee) - Omitted generic organization words
comparison_steps.description: Certificate name 'Omani Packaging' vs invoice name 'Omani Packaging Company SAOG'. The core name 'Omani Packaging' is identical. 'Company' is a generic organization word per 4.1.3.5. 'SAOG' is a legal form (Société Anonyme Omanaise Générale / public joint stock company in Oman). Per 4.1.3.6, legal form abbreviations may be omitted. The certificate name constitutes the identitetsbärande kärna of the invoice name.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Core name identical, differences are only generic organization word 'Company' and legal form 'SAOG'.

comparison_steps.description: 'SAOG' is a legal company form designation in Oman (public joint stock company). Its omission in the certificate is covered by 4.1.3.6.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Legal form omission accepted.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: Oman. Invoice SOLD TO: Oman.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH

rules_applied.description: Priority identification - SOLD TO field used as primary
Omitted generic organization words - 'Company' is generic
Legal form abbreviation - 'SAOG' is an Omani legal company form
Country match - Oman in both documents

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH due to 'Omani Packaging' vs 'Omani Packaging Company SAOG'
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Rejected because the core name 'Omani Packaging' is identical. 'Company' is a generic organization word (4.1.3.5) and 'SAOG' is a legal form designation (4.1.3.6). Both types of differences are explicitly permitted. All conditions of 4.1.3.5 are met: core name identical, difference is only generic word + legal form, no other party with similar name, address/country match.

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'Omani Packaging' matches invoice SOLD TO 'Omani Packaging Company SAOG'. The core name 'Omani Packaging' is identical in both. The word 'Company' is a generic organization word per rule 4.1.3.5, and 'SAOG' is an Omani legal company form per rule 4.1.3.6. Both rules permit these differences. Address shows P.O. Box 99, 124, Rusayl of Oman — consistent between documents (invoice adds postal code 2482 which is additional information). Country Oman matches. No other party with similar name exists in the invoice. MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Kärnnamnet 'Omani Packaging' är identiskt. 'Company' är ett generiskt organisationsord (4.1.3.5) och 'SAOG' är en juridisk bolagsform i Oman (4.1.3.6). Land Oman matchar. MATCH.

goods_description.invoice_value: Fluting ref. Smurfit Westrock - Morai (multiple lines) / Testliner ref. Smurfit Westrock - Morai (multiple lines)

comparison_steps.description: No article numbers are present in the certificate. Proceed to Priority 2.
comparison_steps.result: NOT_APPLICABLE - No article numbers in certificate.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate goods description: 'Fluting & Testliner'. Identify identity-bearing main designations: 'Fluting' and 'Testliner'. Search for these in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 'Fluting' found in invoice description lines (e.g., 'Fluting ref. Smurfit Westrock - Morai'). 'Testliner' found in invoice description lines (e.g., 'Testliner ref. Smurfit Westrock - Morai').

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains additional specifications after main designations: 'ref. Smurfit Westrock - Morai', 'Subs 140gsm, RW 1550mm, DIA 1270mm, Core 100mm'. These are specifications/references that do not change product identity.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Additional specifications do not affect product identity.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designations 'Fluting' and 'Testliner' both found in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions - supplier references and specifications ignored

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because certificate says 'Fluting & Testliner' but invoice has detailed line items with specifications
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Rejected because the identity-bearing main designations 'Fluting' and 'Testliner' are both explicitly present in the invoice. The additional specifications in the invoice (gsm, width, diameter, core size, supplier reference) are non-identity-bearing additions per 4.3.4 and do not change the product identity.

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate describes goods as 'Fluting & Testliner'. The invoice contains multiple line items all described as either 'Fluting ref. Smurfit Westrock - Morai' or 'Testliner ref. Smurfit Westrock - Morai' with various specifications. The identity-bearing main designations are 'Fluting' and 'Testliner'. Both are explicitly and exactly present in the invoice descriptions. The additional text ('ref. Smurfit Westrock - Morai', substrate specifications) are non-identity-bearing additions per 4.3.4. No article numbers in certificate so Priority 2 text matching applies. MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: De identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningarna 'Fluting' och 'Testliner' från certifikatet kan båda identifieras exakt i fakturans varubeskrirvningar. Ytterligare specifikationer i fakturan är icke-identitetsbärande tillägg. MATCH.

quantity.invoice_value: Total Weight Quantity: 867.673 MT; Total Unit Count: 767 Rolls

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains 'G/W 867.673 MT'. This is the verification-basis quantity per rule 4.4.2.1. Certificate box 6 also contains '767 Rolls'.
comparison_steps.result: Verification-basis quantity: G/W 867.673 MT from box 7.

comparison_steps.description: Search for numeric value 867.673 with unit MT in invoice. Found: 'Total Weight Quantity: 867.673 MT' on page 4.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Exact value 867.673 MT found in invoice total line.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate specifies G/W (Gross Weight). Invoice states 'Total Weight Quantity' without explicit GW/NW. However, certificate specifies a single weight value with GW category, and the invoice's total matches exactly. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2, a single weight value matching the invoice with no contradicting alternative → MATCH (but applying more conservative assessment since invoice doesn't specify GW/NW explicitly).
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Single weight value 867.673 MT matched. Invoice does not contain a second contradicting weight value.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 6 states '767 Rolls'. Invoice page 4 states 'Total Unit Count: 767 Rolls'. Exact match.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Second quantity also verified, strengthening confidence.

comparison_steps.description: No contradicting quantity values found in invoice. Both weight (867.673 MT) and unit count (767 Rolls) match exactly.
comparison_steps.result: No contradiction detected.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value (G/W 867.673 MT) used as verification basis
Occurrence check - exact value found in invoice total
Weight category - single value match, no contradicting alternative
Additional quantity 767 Rolls also verified, no contradictions

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MANUAL_REVIEW because invoice says 'Total Weight Quantity' without explicit GW/NW
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Rejected per 4.4.2.2 point 2: certificate has a single weight value (867.673 MT), this value is found in invoice, and invoice does NOT contain a second contradicting weight value of a different category. Therefore MATCH, not MANUAL_REVIEW.

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states 'G/W 867.673 MT'. Invoice page 4 states 'Total Weight Quantity: 867.673 MT' — exact numerical match with same unit. Certificate box 6 states '767 Rolls'. Invoice page 4 states 'Total Unit Count: 767 Rolls' — exact match. Both quantity measures from the certificate are verified in the invoice. No contradicting values exist. The weight category question (GW vs unspecified 'Total Weight Quantity') is resolved by 4.4.2.2 point 2: single weight value matching, no contradicting alternative. MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certifikatets vikt G/W 867.673 MT matchar exakt fakturans 'Total Weight Quantity: 867.673 MT'. Certifikatets 767 Rolls matchar fakturans 'Total Unit Count: 767 Rolls'. Båda kvantitetsuppgifterna verifierade. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin field in invoice. Found: 'Country of Origin: India' on page 1.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND - Explicit Country of Origin field with value 'India'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'India'. Invoice: 'India'. Exact match, no normalization needed.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH

comparison_steps.description: Both certificate and invoice specify a single origin country: India. No mixed origins.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Single uniform origin.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit Country of Origin field
Normalization - exact match, no normalization needed

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'India'. Invoice page 1 has explicit field 'Country of Origin: India'. Additionally, shipping marks state '10207/CNS/Made in India' in both documents. Exact match with no normalization needed. Single origin country. Per rule 4.5 critical rule, origin 'India' differs from consignor country 'Sweden' which is perfectly valid and shall not cause any concern. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Ursprungsland 'India' i certifikatet matchar exakt 'Country of Origin: India' i fakturan. MATCH.

evidence.relevance: SE prefix confirms Sweden for consignor country

evidence.raw_text: P.O. Box 99, 124, Rusayl of Oman, Oman, 2482
Omani Packaging Company SAOG, P.O. Box 99, 124, Rusayl of Oman, Oman, 2482

rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: No LC reference found in certificate
Certificate file contains 1 certificate page. Invoice file contains 5 pages of the same commercial invoice (no. 19531). Clear pairing.

Criterion 2 met: consignor 'Central National Sweden AB' is invoice issuer. Criterion 3 met: consignee 'Omani Packaging' identifiable in SOLD TO. Criterion 1 partially met: order reference 10207 matches.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor search in all invoice pages
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Name 'Central National Sweden AB' found in invoice header on all 5 pages.
Sweden in certificate, Sweden in invoice.
SOLD TO field used as primary factoring field.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Omitted generic organization words (applied to consignee)
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: 'Company' is a generic organization word. Core name 'Omani Packaging' is identical.
'SAOG' is an Omani legal company form — its omission in the certificate is permitted.
Identity-bearing main designations 'Fluting' and 'Testliner' both found in invoice.
Additional specifications in invoice (supplier ref, gsm, width, etc.) do not affect product identity.
G/W 867.673 MT in box 7 is the verification-basis.
867.673 MT found exactly in invoice total.
Single weight value, exact match, no contradicting alternative in invoice. Rule 4.4.2.2 point 2 applies.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Additional quantity verification and contradiction check
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: 767 Rolls also matches. No contradicting quantities.
Explicit 'Country of Origin: India' field found.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter har verifierats framgångsrikt. Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland i certifikatet matchar uppgifterna i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport: Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Central National Sweden AB, Södra Larmgatan 6, 411 16, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Central National Sweden AB, Södra Larmgatan 6, Gothenburg, 41 116, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning — exakt samma företagsnamn i certifikat och faktura
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Central National Sweden AB' är identiskt i båda dokumenten. Land Sverige bekräftas via fakturans adress och VAT-prefix SE.

sections.certificate_value: Omani Packaging, P.O. Box 99, 124 Rusayl of Oman, Oman
sections.invoice_value: Omani Packaging Company SAOG, P.O. Box 99, 124, Rusayl of Oman, Oman, 2482
sections.rule_applied: Utelämnat generiskt organisationsord 'Company' och juridisk bolagsform 'SAOG' — kärnnamn identiskt
sections.motivation: Kärnnamnet 'Omani Packaging' matchar exakt. 'Company' är ett generiskt organisationsord och 'SAOG' är en juridisk bolagsform. Land Oman matchar.

sections.invoice_value: Fluting ref. Smurfit Westrock - Morai / Testliner ref. Smurfit Westrock - Morai (diverse specifikationer)
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning — identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningar 'Fluting' och 'Testliner' identifierade i fakturan
sections.motivation: Certifikatets huvudbeteckningar 'Fluting' och 'Testliner' finns exakt i fakturans artikelbeskrivningar. Ytterligare specifikationer är icke-identitetsbärande tillägg.

sections.invoice_value: Total Weight Quantity: 867.673 MT; Total Unit Count: 767 Rolls
sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll — exakt numeriskt värde identifierat i fakturans totalrad
sections.motivation: Certifikatets vikt 867.673 MT matchar exakt fakturans totalvikt. Certifikatets 767 Rolls matchar exakt fakturans totalantal. Båda kvantiteter verifierade.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning — exakt samma ursprungsland i certifikat och faktura
sections.motivation: Ursprungsland 'India' i certifikatets ruta 3 matchar exakt 'Country of Origin: India' i fakturan.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) har verifierats som MATCH. Certifikatet överensstämmer med fakturan. Dokumentparet rekommenderas för automatiskt godkännande.
